org.key_project.util.java

Class IOUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.java.IOUtil

  • public final class IOUtil
extends Object
    Provides static methods to work with java IO.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  IOUtil.IFileVisitor
      A visitor which does something with Files.
      static class  IOUtil.LineInformation
      A line information returned from computeLineInformation(File) and computeLineInformation(InputStream).

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int BUFFER_SIZE
      The size of used buffers.
      static Charset DEFAULT_CHARSET
      The default charset to use.

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description

      Forbid instances by this private constructor.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Computes line information for each text line in the given File.

      Computes line information for each text line in the given InputStream.
      static String computeMD5(File file)
      Computes the MD5 checksum of the given File.

      Computes the MD5 checksum of the given InputStream and closes it.
      static boolean contains(File parent, File child)
      Checks if the given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
      static boolean contains(Iterable<File> parents, File child)
      Checks if at least one given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
      static boolean copy(InputStream source, OutputStream target)
      Copies the content from the InputStream to the OutputStream and closes both streams.
      static File createTempDirectory(String prefix, String suffix)
      Creates a temporary directory with help of File.createTempFile(String, String).
      static void delete(File file)
      Deletes the given file/folder with all contained sub files/folders.
      static boolean exists(File file)
      Checks if the given File exists.

      static URL getClassLocationURL(Class<?> classInstance)

      Returns the current directory.

      Returns the file extension of the given File if available.
      static String getFileNameWithoutExtension(String fileName)
      Returns the file name without file extension for the given file name with extension.
      static File getHomeDirectory()
      Returns the home directory.
      static File getProjectRoot(Class<?> classInstance) 
      static File getTempDirectory()
      Returns the temporary directory.
      static String readFrom(File file)
      Reads the complete content from the File.
      static String readFrom(InputStream in)
      Reads the complete content from the InputStream and closes it.
      static String readFrom(URL url)
      Reads the complete content from the URL.
      static List<File> search(File file, IFilter<File> filter)
      Searches recursive in the given File all Files accepted by the given IFilter.
      static File toFile(URL url) 
      static String toFileString(URL url) 
      static URI toURI(URL url) 
      static InputStream unifyLineBreaks(InputStream in)
      Replaces all line breaks (\r, \r\n) in the given InputStream with \n.
      static String validateOSIndependentFileName(String name)
      Ensures that the segment is a valid OS independent path segment meaning that it is a valid file/folder name.
      static void visit(File file, IOUtil.IFileVisitor visitor)
      Visits recursive all files and folders.

      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it.

      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it.

      Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it.

    • Field Detail

      • BUFFER_SIZE

        public static final int BUFFER_SIZE
        The size of used buffers.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • DEFAULT_CHARSET

        public static final Charset DEFAULT_CHARSET
        The default charset to use. The value is independent from the current operating system.

    • Constructor Detail

      • IOUtil

        private IOUtil()
        Forbid instances by this private constructor.

    • Method Detail

      • computeMD5

        public static String computeMD5(File file)
                         throws IOException
        Computes the MD5 checksum of the given File.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to compute its MD5 checksum.
        Returns:
        The computed MD5 checksum.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • computeMD5

        public static String computeMD5(InputStream in)
                         throws IOException
        Computes the MD5 checksum of the given InputStream and closes it.
        Parameters:
        in - The InputStream which provides the content to compute its MD5 checksum. The InputStream will be closed.
        Returns:
        The computed MD5 checksum.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • getHomeDirectory

        public static File getHomeDirectory()
        Returns the home directory.
        Returns:
        The home directory.

      • getFileExtension

        public static String getFileExtension(File file)
        Returns the file extension of the given File if available.
        Parameters:
        file - The file to extract it extension.
        Returns:
        The file extension or null if not available.

      • getFileNameWithoutExtension

        public static String getFileNameWithoutExtension(String fileName)
        Returns the file name without file extension for the given file name with extension.
        Parameters:
        file - The file name with extension for that the file name without extension is needed.
        Returns:
        The file name without extension or null if it was not possible to compute it.

      • delete

        public static void delete(File file)
        Deletes the given file/folder with all contained sub files/folders.
        Parameters:
        file - The file/folder to delete.

      • readFrom

        public static String readFrom(URL url)
                       throws IOException
        Reads the complete content from the URL.
        Parameters:
        file - The URL to read from.
        Returns:
        The read content or null if the URL is null.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • readFrom

        public static String readFrom(File file)
                       throws IOException
        Reads the complete content from the File.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to read from.
        Returns:
        The read content or null if the File is null or not an existing file.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • readFrom

        public static String readFrom(InputStream in)
                       throws IOException
        Reads the complete content from the InputStream and closes it.
        Parameters:
        in - The InputStream to read from and to close.
        Returns:
        The read content or null if the InputStream is null.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • writeTo

        public static void writeTo(OutputStream out,
           String content)
                    throws IOException
        Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
        Parameters:
        out - The OutputStream to write to.
        content - The content to write.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • writeTo

        public static void writeTo(OutputStream out,
           String content,
           Charset encoding)
                    throws IOException
        Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
        Parameters:
        out - The OutputStream to write to.
        content - The content to write.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • writeTo

        public static void writeTo(OutputStream out,
           String content,
           String encoding)
                    throws IOException
        Writes the given content into the given OutputStream and closes it. Nothing will be written if the content is null, but the stream will be closed.
        Parameters:
        out - The OutputStream to write to.
        content - The content to write.
        encoding - The encoding to use.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • computeLineInformation

        public static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(File file)
                                                       throws IOException

        Computes line information for each text line in the given File. A IOUtil.LineInformation consists of the offset from the beginning of the file for each line and the indices of tabs '\t' in each line.

        Example content, line break is '\n': 

         Line 1
 Line 2: With some text
 
 Line 4
        Computed line start indices: 
        
 result[0] = new LineInformation(0, new int[0]);
 result[1] = new LineInformation(7, new int[] {7});
 result[2] = new LineInformation(30, new int[0]);
 result[3] = new LineInformation(31, new int[0]);

        Parameters:
        file - The given File.
        Returns:
        The computed start indices.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • computeLineInformation

        public static IOUtil.LineInformation[] computeLineInformation(InputStream in)
                                                       throws IOException

        Computes line information for each text line in the given InputStream. A IOUtil.LineInformation consists of the offset from the beginning of the file for each line and the indices of tabs '\t' in each line.

        Example content, line break is '\n': 

         Line 1
 Line 2:\tWith some text
 
 Line 4
        Computed line start indices: 
        
 result[0] = new LineInformation(0, new int[0]);
 result[1] = new LineInformation(7, new int[] {7});
 result[2] = new LineInformation(30, new int[0]);
 result[3] = new LineInformation(31, new int[0]);

        Parameters:
        file - The given File.
        Returns:
        The computed start indices.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • createTempDirectory

        public static File createTempDirectory(String prefix,
                       String suffix)
                                throws IOException
        Creates a temporary directory with help of File.createTempFile(String, String).
        Parameters:
        prefix - The prefix string to be used in generating the file's name; must be at least three characters long.
        suffix - The suffix string to be used in generating the file's name; may be null, in which case the suffix ".tmp" will be used.
        Returns:
        Created temporary directory.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • search

        public static List<File> search(File file,
                IFilter<File> filter)
                         throws IOException
        Searches recursive in the given File all Files accepted by the given IFilter.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to start search in.
        filter - An optional IFilter used to accept files. Without a filter all Files are accepted.
        Returns:
        The accepted Files.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception

      • visit

        public static void visit(File file,
         IOUtil.IFileVisitor visitor)
                  throws IOException
        Visits recursive all files and folders.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to start in.
        visitor - The IOUtil.IFileVisitor which does something with the visited files
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception

      • unifyLineBreaks

        public static InputStream unifyLineBreaks(InputStream in)
                                   throws IOException
        Replaces all line breaks (\r, \r\n) in the given InputStream with \n.
        Parameters:
        in - The InputStream to replace line breaks in.
        Returns:
        A new InputStream with with the replaced line breaks.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • contains

        public static boolean contains(Iterable<File> parents,
               File child)
        Checks if at least one given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
        Parameters:
        parents - The parent File.
        child - The child File to check for containment in parents.
        Returns:
        true child is contained (recursive) in at least one parent, false child is not contained in any parent.

      • contains

        public static boolean contains(File parent,
               File child)
        Checks if the given parent File contains (recursive) the child File.
        Parameters:
        parent - The parent File.
        child - The child File to check for containment in parent.
        Returns:
        true child is contained (recursive) in parent, false child is not contained in parent.

      • copy

        public static boolean copy(InputStream source,
           OutputStream target)
                    throws IOException
        Copies the content from the InputStream to the OutputStream and closes both streams.
        Parameters:
        source - The InputStream to read from.
        target - The OutputStream to write to.
        Returns:
        true if copy was performed and false if not performed.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.

      • exists

        public static boolean exists(File file)
        Checks if the given File exists.
        Parameters:
        file - The File to check.
        Returns:
        true File is not null and exists, false otherwise.

      • getClassLocationURL

        public static final URL getClassLocationURL(Class<?> classInstance)

      • getClassLocation

        public static final File getClassLocation(Class<?> classInstance)

      • getProjectRoot

        public static final File getProjectRoot(Class<?> classInstance)

      • toFile

        public static File toFile(URL url)

      • toFileString

        public static String toFileString(URL url)

      • toURI

        public static URI toURI(URL url)

      • getCurrentDirectory

        public static File getCurrentDirectory()
        Returns the current directory.
        Returns:
        The current directory.

      • getTempDirectory

        public static File getTempDirectory()
        Returns the temporary directory.
        Returns:
        The temporary directory.

      • validateOSIndependentFileName

        public static String validateOSIndependentFileName(String name)
        Ensures that the segment is a valid OS independent path segment meaning that it is a valid file/folder name. Each invalid sign will be replaced by '_'.
        Parameters:
        segment - The segment to validate.
        Returns:
        The validated OS independent path segment in which each invalid sign is replaced.
